purpose: Defines the public-safe acquisition route inventory shape used after authority source inventory review and before any fetch, manual snapshot, dry run, normalization, calendar projection, or scheduler implementation.

field_definitions.route_id: Stable public-safe identifier for this acquisition route.
field_definitions.authority_id: Authority identifier matching an authority source inventory record.
field_definitions.official_source_id: Official source identifier matching an authority source inventory record.
field_definitions.source_url: Official source URL or stable official route URL used for checking.
field_definitions.acquisition_mode: Allowed acquisition posture for this route: manual snapshot, dry run, scheduled candidate, or disabled.
field_definitions.output_target: Highest public-safe downstream output this route may produce.
field_definitions.allowed_refresh_scope: Maximum refresh scope permitted by this route contract.
field_definitions.last_checked_date: Date the route was last checked, using YYYY-MM-DD, or null when not checked yet.
field_definitions.status: Route readiness/status label for review, manual verification, dry-run-only use, scheduler candidacy, blocking, disabling, or staleness.
field_definitions.notes: Public-safe route notes; no private workflow notes, internal strategy, raw source content, entries, odds, results, payouts, predictions, tips, or full racecards.

explicit_exclusions: no real route records in the placeholder inventory
